name: ip2whois
description: Looks up WHOIS records for configured domains via the IP2WHOIS API, exposing a flattened whois stream and per-role contact streams (registrant, admin, tech, billing). The nameservers stream is not migrated; see docs.md Known limits.

risk.read: external IP2WHOIS API read of WHOIS records for the configured domain set
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface
